title: Lesson 86
paragraph: This lesson practices useful nouns for phones and computers.

words.meaning: a thing used to give power to a phone or computer
words.example: My charger is in my bag.

words.meaning: the part that gives power to a phone or machine
the part of a phone or computer that shows pictures and words
a board with keys for typing
a machine that puts words or pictures on paper
a place on the internet with pages and information
words.example: This website helps me study English.

words.meaning: secret letters or numbers used to open an account
words.example: Do not tell anyone your password.
Save the file before you close it.

words.meaning: a place for keeping files on a computer
words.example: Put the photo in this folder.

words.meaning: a small picture on a phone or computer
